commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f58e27e71e2f8fd39c60d5718b55ad801d21f1f2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR filters Control UI chat session-list and picker RPC requests by an agentId so the chat session picker is scoped to the active agent.

PR surface: Source +11. Total +11 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main builds chat session-list overrides without agentId, loadSessions forwards agentId when supplied, and the picker renders the loaded sessionsResult rows directly. I did not run a live Control UI instance in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This external PR needs contributor proof and a small code correction, so it should stay in normal PR review rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: fix(ui): filter session picker by selected agentId
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #86183 — Control UI session picker now filters sessions by the currently selected agent
- `createChatSessionsLoadOverrides()` now reads `agentsSelectedId` from state and passes it as `agentId` to `sessions.list`

## Root Cause

`createChatSessionsLoadOverrides()` in `app-chat.ts` was building `LoadSessionsOverrides` without including the `agentId` field. The backend `sessions.list` RPC supports agent filtering, and `loadSessions()` already passes `overrides.agentId` through when present — but the overrides factory never set it.

This caused the session picker dropdown in the Control UI Chat to display sessions from all configured agents (e.g., `stockclaw`, `printclaw`, `fileclaw`, `boardgame`) instead of only sessions belonging to the currently selected agent.

## Fix

Extended the `state` parameter type of `createChatSessionsLoadOverrides` to accept `{ sessionsShowArchived?: boolean; agentsSelectedId?: string | null }` and added logic to set `overrides.agentId` when a non-empty `agentsSelectedId` is present.

All callers (`refreshSessionOptions` in session-controls.ts, `refreshChat` in app-chat.ts, and calls in app-gateway.ts / app-render.helpers.ts) pass a host/state object that already includes `agentsSelectedId`, so no caller changes were needed.

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Control UI (session picker)
- [x] Chat

## Real Behavior Proof

**Setup:** Multi-agent OpenClaw instance running on Android/Termux with agents: `main`, and additional agents configured.

**Tested:**
1. Opened Control UI at `http://127.0.0.1:18789/`
2. Selected agent `main` in the agent selector
3. Opened the session picker — verified it now only shows sessions with keys starting with `agent:main:`
4. Switched to another agent — verified session picker updates accordingly

**Not tested:** Pagination with large session lists, agents with no sessions.

## Screenshots

Before: Session picker showed sessions from all agents (18+ entries across multiple agents).
After: Session picker shows only sessions for the selected agent.

## AI-Assisted

Yes — patch written by OpenClaw agent (running as "Rudra Junior" on the contributor's Android/Termux instance). The contributor reviewed the code change, confirmed understanding, and tested on their live instance.
target.author: rudra496
